extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI out-sprinted VALVERDE in final 500m after Alejandro set pace from 1300m out, pole taking inside line in final meters.
tactical_patterns: VALVERDE unwilling to let Quick-Step rider attempt solo steal from 1300m, forced to lead chase himself creating tactical vulnerability.
KWIATKOWSKI deliberately held inferior position until final meters then exploited inside line advantage through technical section.
Sky maintained pace-setting control to protect race lead despite CASTROVIEGO and Gorka IZAGIRRE both dropping unexpectedly early.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: positioned himself defensively mid-pack then used superior technical line selection to overcome VALVERDE's early jump
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: tactically forced into leading out despite clearly superior form, caught on outside line in final turn
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Gorka: negative: surprisingly dropped on pace not described as punishing, concerning weakness for Bahrain GC ambitions
rider_signals.CASTROVIEJO Jonathan: negative: distanced despite Sky controlling moderate tempo, suggests poor recovery from TTT effort previous day
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: neutral: last breakaway survivor absorbed after establishing long-distance move with DE GENDT Thomas
